Select Theme

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AuthController
     
    AuthRequest
     
    AuthResponse
     
    AuthService
    Service responsible for retrieving the authenticated user from the security context.
    Category
     
    CategoryController
    REST controller providing CRUD operations for user-owned categories.
    CategoryDto
    Data Transfer Object representing a category without exposing internal entity details.
    CategoryMapper
    Utility class responsible for converting Category entities into CategoryDto objects.
    CategoryRepository
    Repository interface for managing Category entities.
    CreateCategoryDto
    DTO used for creating or updating a category.
    CreateTransactionDto
    DTO used for creating or updating a transaction.
    JwtFilter
     
    JwtService
     
    PersonalFinanceManagerApplication
     
    RecurrenceType
    Defines how often a recurring transaction occurs.
    SecurityConfig
     
    TestsController
     
    Transaction
     
    TransactionController
    REST controller providing CRUD operations for user-owned transactions.
    TransactionDto
    Data Transfer Object representing a transaction with category information.
    TransactionMapper
    Utility class responsible for converting Transaction entities into TransactionDto objects.
    TransactionRepository
    Repository interface for managing Transaction entities.
    TransactionType
     
    UnsupportedRecurrenceTypeException
    Exception thrown when a transaction has an unsupported recurrence type for recurrence date computation.
    User
     
    UserController
    REST controller exposing endpoints related to authenticated user information.
    UserDto
    Data Transfer Object representing a simplified view of a User.
    UserFinancialStateDto
    DTO representing the complete financial state of a user.
    UserFinancialStateService
    Service responsible for computing the financial state of a user.
    UserMapper
    Utility class responsible for converting User entities into UserDto objects.
    UserRepository
